subject: Re: Peter Capone
body:
asap have him send samples of his work

----- Original Message ----
From: John Amerling <john_amerling@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: Doug Schoettle <dshoettle@nes-ny.com>
Sent: Monday, March 3, 2008 3:06:22 PM
Subject: RE: Peter Capone

I contacted him today. He would be interested in your work and would be
pleased to come to the island. Please let me know what arrangements you
would like to make, i.e. timing, compensation, scope, and who participates.
Doug or I can then follow up. 

-----Original Message-----
From: J. Epstein [mailto:jeeproject@yahoo.com] 
Sent: Saturday, March 01, 2008 8:03 PM
To: john amerling
Cc: Emad Hanna
Subject: 

john please contact the firm of Peter Capone and Associates , they did a
large spa in georgia, sea island  and I would like him to see the island
